markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Giancarlo Stanton is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Giancarlo Stanton starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Giancarlo Stanton is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Giancarlo Stanton is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.
